mapper.insert: insert into report (user_id, content_id, report_type, report_reason, status, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{contentId}, #{reportType}, #{reportReason}, #{status}, now())
mapper.select: select id, user_id, content_id, report_type, report_reason, status, handler_id, handle_result, create_time, handle_time from report where id = #{id} limit 1
select id, user_id, content_id, report_type, report_reason, status, handler_id, handle_result, create_time, handle_time from report where user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc
select id, user_id, content_id, report_type, report_reason, status, handler_id, handle_result, create_time, handle_time from report where status = 0 order by create_time asc
mapper.update: update report set status = #{status}, handler_id = #{handlerId}, handle_result = #{handleResult}, handle_time = now() where id = #{id}
